description: Use 3C/3D as artificial raises after 1M to show different strength levels
purpose: Distinguish between weak, constructive, limit, and game-forcing raises of partner's major so opener can judge the right level

teaching.tradeoff: Uses 3C and 3D as conventional raises, giving up natural minor bids over 1M.
teaching.principle: Immediately show trump support and strength — the Law of Total Tricks says bid to the level of your combined trump length.
commonMistakes: Remember 3C is constructive (7-10) and 3D is limit (10-12) — don't confuse the order
With 4+ trump support and 12+ HCP with a shortage, bid the short suit as a splinter instead of using Bergen

explanationEntries.displayText: Has 4-card support in at least one major
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Does not have 4-card support in either major

explanationEntries.displayText: Enough strength for a splinter raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough strength for a splinter raise

explanationEntries.displayText: Enough HCP for a Bergen game raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough HCP for a Bergen game raise

explanationEntries.displayText: Enough HCP for a limit raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough HCP for a limit raise

explanationEntries.displayText: Enough HCP for a constructive raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough HCP for a constructive raise

explanationEntries.displayText: HCP consistent with a preemptive raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Too many HCP for a preemptive raise

explanationEntries.displayText: Has enough support for opener's major
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough support for opener's major

explanationEntries.displayText: Has a short suit (singleton or void)
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: No short suit for a splinter

explanationEntries.displayText: 17+ HCP to bid game after constructive raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough HCP (need 17+) to bid game after constructive raise

explanationEntries.displayText: 14-16 HCP for a game try after constructive raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: HCP not in game-try range (14-16) after constructive raise

explanationEntries.displayText: 15+ HCP to accept the limit raise
18+ total points to bid game over preemptive raise
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough total points (need 18+) to bid game over preemptive raise

explanationEntries.displayText: Enough HCP to accept the game try
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Not enough HCP to accept the game try

explanationEntries.displayText: HCP within the system's 1NT response range
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: HCP outside the system's 1NT response range

explanationEntries.displayText: Opening 1♥: 12+ HCP with 5+ hearts
Opening 1♠: 12+ HCP with 5+ spades
Splinter in hearts: 12+ pts, 4+ trumps, shortness
Bergen game raise in hearts: 13+ pts, 4+ trumps
Bergen limit raise in hearts: 10-12 pts, 4+ trumps (3♦)
Bergen constructive raise in hearts: 7-10 pts, 4+ trumps (3♣)
Preemptive raise to 3♥: 0-6 pts, 4+ trumps
Natural 1NT response to 1♥: within system range, no 4-card support
Splinter in spades: 12+ pts, 4+ trumps, shortness
Bergen game raise in spades: 13+ pts, 4+ trumps
Bergen limit raise in spades: 10-12 pts, 4+ trumps (3♦)
Bergen constructive raise in spades: 7-10 pts, 4+ trumps (3♣)
Preemptive raise to 3♠: 0-6 pts, 4+ trumps
Natural 1NT response to 1♠: within system range, no 4-card support
Opener bids 4♥ after constructive raise (17+ HCP)
Opener makes a game try with 3♦ after constructive raise (14-16 HCP)
Opener signs off in 3♥ after constructive raise
Opener bids 4♠ after constructive raise (17+ HCP)
Opener makes a game try with 3♥ after constructive raise (14-16 HCP)
Opener signs off in 3♠ after constructive raise
Opener accepts limit raise and bids 4♥ (15+ HCP)
Opener declines limit raise and signs off in 3♥
Opener accepts limit raise and bids 4♠ (15+ HCP)
Opener declines limit raise and signs off in 3♠
Opener bids 4♥ despite preemptive raise (18+ total pts)
Opener passes after preemptive raise to 3♥
Opener bids 4♠ despite preemptive raise (18+ total pts)
Opener passes after preemptive raise to 3♠
Accept game try and bid 4♥
Accept game try and bid 4♠
Reject game try and sign off in 3♥
Reject game try and sign off in 3♠
Responder accepts opener's game bid
Responder accepts opener's signoff
Opener accepts game after responder accepts the try

teachingLabel.name: 1♥ opening
teachingLabel.summary: Open 1 heart to show 5+ hearts and 12-21 HCP

teachingLabel.name: 1♠ opening
teachingLabel.summary: Open 1 spade to show 5+ spades and 12-21 HCP

teachingLabel.name: Splinter (3S)
teachingLabel.summary: Show game-forcing raise with 4+ trump support and shortness in a side suit

teachingLabel.name: Game raise (4H)
teachingLabel.summary: Raise directly to game with 13+ HCP and 4-card trump support

teachingLabel.name: Limit raise (3D)
teachingLabel.summary: Show 4+ card support with 10-12 HCP, inviting game via artificial 3D

teachingLabel.name: Constructive raise (3C)
teachingLabel.summary: Show 4+ card support with 7-10 HCP via artificial 3C, competing for the partscore

teachingLabel.name: Preemptive raise (3H)
teachingLabel.summary: Raise to the 3-level with 4+ trump support and weak values to obstruct opponents

teachingLabel.name: 1NT response
teachingLabel.summary: Deny 4-card support for opener's major, showing a balanced hand within system range

teachingLabel.name: Splinter (3H)
teachingLabel.summary: Show game-forcing raise with 4+ trump support and shortness in a side suit

teachingLabel.name: Game raise (4S)
teachingLabel.summary: Raise directly to game with 13+ HCP and 4-card trump support

teachingLabel.name: Limit raise (3D)
teachingLabel.summary: Show 4+ card support with 10-12 HCP, inviting game via artificial 3D

teachingLabel.name: Constructive raise (3C)
teachingLabel.summary: Show 4+ card support with 7-10 HCP via artificial 3C, competing for the partscore

teachingLabel.name: Preemptive raise (3S)
teachingLabel.summary: Raise to the 3-level with 4+ trump support and weak values to obstruct opponents

teachingLabel.name: 1NT response
teachingLabel.summary: Deny 4-card support for opener's major, showing a balanced hand within system range

teachingLabel.name: Accept constructive
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game with 17+ HCP after partner's constructive raise

teachingLabel.name: Game try (3D)
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game with 14-16 HCP by bidding a help suit after the constructive raise

teachingLabel.name: Decline constructive
teachingLabel.summary: Sign off at the 3-level with 13 or fewer HCP, declining the game invitation

teachingLabel.name: Accept constructive
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game with 17+ HCP after partner's constructive raise

teachingLabel.name: Game try (3H)
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game with 14-16 HCP by bidding a help suit after the constructive raise

teachingLabel.name: Decline constructive
teachingLabel.summary: Sign off at the 3-level with 13 or fewer HCP, declining the game invitation

teachingLabel.name: Accept limit raise
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game with 15+ HCP after partner's limit raise shows 10-12 points

teachingLabel.name: Decline limit raise
teachingLabel.summary: Sign off at the 3-level with 14 or fewer HCP, settling for partscore

teachingLabel.name: Accept limit raise
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game with 15+ HCP after partner's limit raise shows 10-12 points

teachingLabel.name: Decline limit raise
teachingLabel.summary: Sign off at the 3-level with 14 or fewer HCP, settling for partscore

teachingLabel.name: Bid game over preemptive (4H)
teachingLabel.summary: Raise to game with 18+ total points despite partner's weak hand

teachingLabel.name: Pass over preemptive
teachingLabel.summary: Accept the preemptive level with 17 or fewer total points

teachingLabel.name: Bid game over preemptive (4S)
teachingLabel.summary: Raise to game with 18+ total points despite partner's weak hand

teachingLabel.name: Pass over preemptive
teachingLabel.summary: Accept the preemptive level with 17 or fewer total points

teachingLabel.name: Accept partner's game bid → pass
teachingLabel.summary: Pass after opener bids game, accepting the final contract

teachingLabel.name: Accept partner's signoff → pass
teachingLabel.summary: Pass after opener signs off, ending the auction at partscore

teachingLabel.name: Accept game try → game (4H)
teachingLabel.summary: Accept opener's game try with 9-10 HCP at the top of the constructive range

teachingLabel.name: Reject game try → signoff (3H)
teachingLabel.summary: Reject opener's game try with 7-8 HCP, returning to the agreed trump suit

teachingLabel.name: Accept game try → game (4S)
teachingLabel.summary: Accept opener's game try with 9-10 HCP at the top of the constructive range

teachingLabel.name: Reject game try → signoff (3S)
teachingLabel.summary: Reject opener's game try with 7-8 HCP, returning to the agreed trump suit

teachingLabel.name: Accept game try decision → pass
teachingLabel.summary: Pass after responder decides on the game try, accepting their judgment

definitions.description: Has exactly 4-card support in at least one major
